title: lactucella undulata
intro: Lactucella undulata, also known as the undulate milk thistle, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as flavonoids, silymarin, and sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective properties. The health benefits of Lactucella undulata include its ability to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and improve overall liver function. Lactucella undulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support liver health and promote overall well-being.
